evals.prompt: Bestell mir Milch, Brot und Butter bei Migros
evals.expected_output: Should login, create a new list with today's date, search for each product (Milch, Brot, Butter), add them to the cart, validate the cart, and produce a share URL with a summary report.

assertions.name: list-created-with-date
assertions.description: Created a new shopping list with today's date (22.03.)

assertions.name: searched-all-products
assertions.description: Ran search for all 3 items: Milch, Brot, Butter

assertions.name: products-added
assertions.description: Added exactly 3 products to cart via migros-add.sh

assertions.name: summary-report
assertions.description: Output includes Added/Not added/Share link sections

evals.prompt: I need ingredients for a pasta carbonara from Migros — spaghetti, speck, eier, parmesan, and rahm
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this as a recipe/ingredient list, login, create a new list, search for each ingredient (spaghetti, Speck, Eier, Parmesan, Rahm), select appropriate products, add them to the cart, and produce a share URL with a summary report.

assertions.name: list-created-with-date
assertions.description: Created a new shopping list with today's date

assertions.name: searched-all-ingredients
assertions.description: Searched for all 5 ingredients: spaghetti, speck, eier, parmesan, rahm

assertions.name: products-added
assertions.description: Added exactly 5 products to cart via migros-add.sh

assertions.name: summary-report
assertions.description: Output includes Added/Not added/Share link sections

evals.prompt: Füg Migros Bio Vollmilch und M-Budget Toast zu meinem Migros Warenkorb hinzu
evals.expected_output: Should login, create a new list, search for 'Vollmilch' and filter for Bio, search for 'Toast' and filter for M-Budget, add them to the cart, validate, and produce a share URL with a summary.

assertions.name: list-created-with-date
assertions.description: Created a new shopping list with today's date

assertions.name: brand-matching
assertions.description: Selected a Bio product for Vollmilch and an M-Budget product for Toast

assertions.name: products-added
assertions.description: Added exactly 2 products to cart via migros-add.sh

assertions.name: summary-report
assertions.description: Output includes Added/Not added/Share link sections
